description: Audio-free example corpus for controlled local OmniVoice quality comparisons. Replace every reference path and transcript in a private copy before running.

voices.reference_text: EDIT THIS: exact transcript of voice A reference audio.
EDIT THIS: exact transcript of voice B reference audio.

lines.text: The gate is open.
Meet me beside the old fountain when the market closes.
We followed the river until dusk, crossed the narrow bridge, and found the missing cart exactly where the merchant said it would be.
I cannot believe you came back for me!
Wait—did you hear that? No... perhaps it was only the wind.
Keep your lantern lit.
The captain expects our report before the morning bell.
Although the road appears quiet, the fresh tracks beside the milestone suggest that several riders passed this way less than an hour ago.
Please, do not leave me alone in this place.
Three keys, two doors, one chance—which lock do we try first?
Nothing moves below.
Bring the sealed letter directly to the northern watchtower.
If the storm reaches us before sunrise, secure the shutters, move the supplies upstairs, and keep everyone away from the flooded courtyard.
At last, the whole village is safe!
You promised—twice—that this was safe; now look around!
Take the second path.
A warm meal and a quiet room are waiting inside.
Before you sign the agreement, read the final paragraph carefully, because its smallest promise may carry the greatest consequence.
No! This cannot be how our story ends.
Well, then: maps, rope, water—and absolutely no singing.
